goal: Deliver DEC-0057 unified analytics: /analytics/grafana/ proxy, six /analytics/{slug} iframe pages, Analytics nav, Wealth migration, Grafana anonymous compose env, CSP frame-src, env contract, tests, US-0011 user guide.
scope: GRAFANA_UPSTREAM AppConfig with allowlisted host validation
Backend analytics proxy at /analytics/grafana/ (prefix strip, WebSocket, X-Frame-Options rewrite)
Grafana anonymous Viewer and allow_embedding env in docker-compose.yml
AnalyticsEmbedPage and six dashboard routes in App.tsx
WealthPage in-app /analytics/portfolio link (deprecate external Grafana tab)
SPA CSP frame-src self for same-origin iframe embed
Proxy and WebSocket integration smoke tests
risks: WebSocket proxy gaps — mandatory QA smoke on live refresh panel (R-0056 §4)
Anonymous Grafana Viewer isolation — DEC-0057 decision gate if omniflow smoke fails
Framing headers — proxy rewrite + CSP frame-src (R-0056 §2)
Upstream SSRF — allowlist validation on GRAFANA_UPSTREAM host
